Models Spec Operating Monetize
Manual Log in Source
((•)) THE MODELS · a directory of live stations

Tune the dial.

Every model is a band; every home GPU serving it is a station on air. Sweep the dial to a model, read the signal, then pick up a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint on the CLI. This directory is live, real data only - we show every model on air; operators stay a callsign and a coarse region, nothing more.

FIG. 1 - THE DIAL · LIVE BAND
§1 / THE DIRECTORY · LIVE

Read the band.

The live model directory, mirroring rogerai search. Real data only - if nothing is on air, the band is quiet. Sort it, filter it, sweep the dial above to a model, then open it for the full station list. Auto-refreshes every 30s.

/
(()) tuning in to the broker…
model · stations signal $/1M in · out tok/s on air status

(()) the band is quiet - no models on air right now.

put yours on air: rogerai share

no models match - widen the search or clear the filters.

◉ on air · ◆ TEE-verified confidential (real hardware attestation; others are standard) · ▁▂▃▄▅▆▇█ signal · prices in $ / 1M tokens · real data only

§2 / QSL CARD
CONFIRMING CONTACT WITH

model

- stations on air
········ SIGNAL --/100 (())
FIG. 2 - STATION LOG
callsign · region $/1M in·out tok/s ttft ok%

    operators are pseudonymous: a @callsign + a coarse region only. no names, precise location, host, IP, email or account ids.

    LINEAGE

    ◆ ed25519 co-signed - weights · shard · token

    verification: -

    TIME-OF-USE

    schedule: continuous

    HOW TO TUNE IN

    then point any OpenAI client at the local endpoint:

    http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1 · key-scoped

    ← back to the directory RogerAI · QSL

    Report a station

    station: -

    Reports can be anonymous. Do not paste secrets. The Acceptable Use Policy is in the Terms.

    Already on air? Pull the latest:

    Or re-run the installer (it upgrades in place):

    SET rogerai - REV 2026.06 - OpenAI-compatible - PolyForm Perimeter 1.0.0

    © 2026 RogerAI · built on real machines the band is open · roger that
